title: 「Let alone」句型
titleEn: Using Let alone to introduce a more difficult or extreme idea
formula: Subject + negative or limiting statement about X, let alone + a more difficult, unlikely or extreme Y

formulas.formula: Subject + negative or limiting statement about X, let alone + a more difficult, unlikely or extreme Y
Subject + cannot + X, let alone + Y

formulas.labelZh: 以 already 表達第一項已很難得
formulas.formula: X is already difficult or surprising, let alone + Y

example: Going to high school was already a blessing for me, let alone going to college.
exampleZh: 對我來說，能夠上高中已經是一種福氣，更不用說上大學了。

examples.en: Going to high school was already a blessing for me, let alone going to college.
examples.zh: 對我來說，能夠上高中已經是一種福氣，更不用說上大學了。

examples.en: He cannot cook a simple meal, let alone prepare a three-course dinner.
examples.zh: 他連簡單的一餐也不會煮，更不用說準備三道菜的晚餐。
examples.highlight: let alone prepare a three-course dinner

meaning.zh: Let alone 把較基本或較容易的意思放在前面，再引出更困難、更不可能或程度更高的意思。

rules.zh: 把較容易、程度較低或較基本的事情放在 let alone 前面。
rules.en: Put the less extreme, easier or more basic idea first.

rules.zh: Let alone 最常用於 cannot、do not、have never、barely、hardly 等否定或限制性說法之後。
rules.en: Let alone commonly follows a negative or limiting idea.

rules.zh: 當第一項成就或情況本身已經令人意外、難得或困難時，也可以在正面 already 說法後使用 let alone。
rules.en: It can also follow an already statement when the first achievement is itself surprising or difficult.

rules.zh: 兩邊盡量使用相同的文法形式。
rules.en: Keep the two parts grammatically parallel whenever possible.

rules.zh: 意思清楚時，可以省略重複的字詞。
rules.en: Repeated words may be omitted when the meaning remains clear.

rules.zh: 在 let alone 前使用逗號。
rules.en: Use a comma before let alone.

rules.zh: Let alone 強調第二項更困難、更不可能或更極端；not to mention 主要補充另一項相關資料。
rules.en: Let alone presents a clear scale; not to mention mainly adds another relevant point.

benefits.zh: 這個句型能讓讀者立即明白，第二件事情比第一件事情更困難、更不可能或程度更高。
benefits.en: It shows the difference in degree clearly.

benefits.zh: 它把較基本的情況和程度更高的情況連接起來，不需要分成兩句。
benefits.en: It combines two related ideas in one sentence.

benefits.zh: 它可以自然地加強語氣，突出第二件事情有多麼困難、不切實際或令人意外。
benefits.en: It adds strong but natural emphasis.

benefits.zh: 它能清楚說明某人缺乏足夠的時間、金錢、經驗、信心、體力或能力。
benefits.en: It helps explain limitations involving time, money, experience, confidence, strength or ability.

benefits.zh: 它能減少重複使用 It is even more difficult to 等較長說法。

en: Rewrite each sentence or pair of sentences using let alone.
Place the less difficult, less extreme or more basic idea before let alone, and place the more difficult or extreme idea after it.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 let alone 改寫以下句子。
把較容易、程度較低或較基本的事情放在 let alone 前面，並把更困難或程度更高的事情放在後面。
改寫時必須保留原句意思。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: I cannot boil an egg. Cooking a full dinner is far beyond me.
questions.promptZh: 我連雞蛋也不會煮。要我煮一頓完整的晚餐就更加不可能。
questions.answer: I cannot boil an egg, let alone cook a full dinner.
questions.answerZh: 我連雞蛋也不會煮，更不用說煮一頓完整的晚餐。
questions.highlight: I cannot boil an egg, let alone cook a full dinner.

questions.prompt: Mia cannot lift this small box. The heavy suitcase is even more difficult for her.
questions.promptZh: 米婭連這個小箱子也搬不起。那個沉重的行李箱對她來說就更加困難。
questions.answer: Mia cannot lift this small box, let alone the heavy suitcase.
questions.answerZh: 米婭連這個小箱子也搬不起，更不用說那個沉重的行李箱。
questions.highlight: Mia cannot lift this small box, let alone the heavy suitcase.

questions.prompt: Ben has never travelled outside Hong Kong. Living abroad is even further from his experience.
questions.promptZh: 本從未離開香港旅行。在外國生活對他來說就更加遙不可及。
questions.answer: Ben has never travelled outside Hong Kong, let alone lived abroad.
questions.answerZh: 本從未離開香港旅行，更不用說在外國生活。
questions.highlight: Ben has never travelled outside Hong Kong, let alone lived abroad.

questions.prompt: The child cannot spell his own name. Writing a full sentence is impossible for him.
questions.promptZh: 這個孩子連自己的名字也不會拼寫。要他寫出完整句子是不可能的。
questions.answer: The child cannot spell his own name, let alone write a full sentence.
questions.answerZh: 這個孩子連自己的名字也不會拼寫，更不用說寫完整句子。
questions.highlight: The child cannot spell his own name, let alone write a full sentence.

questions.prompt: We cannot afford a new sofa. Renovating the whole flat is completely out of the question.
questions.promptZh: 我們連一張新梳化也買不起。翻新整個單位就更加不用考慮。
questions.answer: We cannot afford a new sofa, let alone renovate the whole flat.
questions.answerZh: 我們連一張新梳化也買不起，更不用說翻新整個單位。
questions.highlight: We cannot afford a new sofa, let alone renovate the whole flat.

questions.prompt: Ava barely has time to eat breakfast. She certainly has no time to prepare a packed lunch.
questions.promptZh: 艾娃連吃早餐的時間也幾乎沒有。她當然沒有時間準備飯盒。
questions.answer: Ava barely has time to eat breakfast, let alone prepare a packed lunch.
questions.answerZh: 艾娃連吃早餐的時間也幾乎沒有，更不用說準備飯盒。
questions.highlight: Ava barely has time to eat breakfast, let alone prepare a packed lunch.

questions.prompt: This old phone cannot open the app. It has no chance of running the latest game.
questions.promptZh: 這部舊電話連這個應用程式也開不到。它根本不可能運行最新的遊戲。
questions.answer: This old phone cannot open the app, let alone run the latest game.
questions.answerZh: 這部舊電話連這個應用程式也開不到，更不用說運行最新的遊戲。
questions.highlight: This old phone cannot open the app, let alone run the latest game.

questions.prompt: Leo does not understand the first question. The final one is much harder.
questions.promptZh: 里奧連第一條問題也不明白。最後一條就更加困難。
questions.answer: Leo does not understand the first question, let alone the final one.
questions.answerZh: 里奧連第一條問題也不明白，更不用說最後一條。
questions.highlight: Leo does not understand the first question, let alone the final one.

questions.prompt: Reaching the final was already a surprise. Winning the championship was beyond everyone’s expectations.
questions.promptZh: 能夠打入決賽已經令人意外。贏得冠軍更是超出所有人的預期。
questions.answer: Reaching the final was already a surprise, let alone winning the championship.
questions.answerZh: 能夠打入決賽已經令人意外，更不用說贏得冠軍。
questions.highlight: Reaching the final was already a surprise, let alone winning the championship.

questions.prompt: Sarah is too nervous to greet the audience. Giving a speech is impossible for her.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉緊張得連向觀眾打招呼也做不到。要她發表演說是不可能的。
questions.answer: Sarah is too nervous to greet the audience, let alone give a speech.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉緊張得連向觀眾打招呼也做不到，更不用說發表演說。
questions.highlight: Sarah is too nervous to greet the audience, let alone give a speech.

questions.prompt: My brother is not confident enough to drive on quiet roads. Driving in heavy traffic is even more difficult for him.
questions.promptZh: 我弟弟連在寧靜道路上駕駛也沒有足夠信心。在繁忙交通中駕駛對他來說就更加困難。
questions.answer: My brother is not confident enough to drive on quiet roads, let alone in heavy traffic.
questions.answerZh: 我弟弟連在寧靜道路上駕駛也沒有足夠信心，更不用說在繁忙交通中駕駛。
questions.highlight: My brother is not confident enough to drive on quiet roads, let alone in heavy traffic.

questions.prompt: The students can barely finish one page. Completing the whole chapter is not realistic.
questions.promptZh: 學生連一頁也幾乎完成不到。要他們完成整個章節並不實際。
questions.answer: The students can barely finish one page, let alone the whole chapter.
questions.answerZh: 學生連一頁也幾乎完成不到，更不用說整個章節。
questions.highlight: The students can barely finish one page, let alone the whole chapter.

questions.prompt: The restaurant cannot serve twenty guests at the same time. A group of one hundred is far beyond its capacity.
questions.promptZh: 這間餐廳無法同時招待二十位客人。一百人的團體遠遠超出它的接待能力。
questions.answer: The restaurant cannot serve twenty guests at the same time, let alone a group of one hundred.
questions.answerZh: 這間餐廳連二十位客人也無法同時招待，更不用說一百人的團體。
questions.highlight: The restaurant cannot serve twenty guests at the same time, let alone a group of one hundred.

questions.prompt: Daniel has never used a basic camera. A professional one is even further beyond his experience.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾從未使用過基本相機。專業相機就更超出他的經驗範圍。
questions.answer: Daniel has never used a basic camera, let alone a professional one.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾從未使用過基本相機，更不用說專業相機。
questions.highlight: Daniel has never used a basic camera, let alone a professional one.

questions.prompt: We do not have enough chairs for the class. There are certainly none available for the parents.
questions.promptZh: 我們連供學生使用的椅子也不夠。當然更沒有椅子供家長使用。
questions.answer: We do not have enough chairs for the class, let alone the parents.
questions.answerZh: 我們連供學生使用的椅子也不夠，更不用說供家長使用的椅子。

questions.prompt: The village has no clinic. It certainly has no large hospital.
questions.promptZh: 這條村連診所也沒有。它當然更加沒有大型醫院。
questions.answer: The village has no clinic, let alone a large hospital.
questions.answerZh: 這條村連診所也沒有，更不用說大型醫院。
questions.highlight: The village has no clinic, let alone a large hospital.

questions.prompt: Chloe could hardly walk after the race. Climbing the stairs was impossible for her.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊在比賽後幾乎連路也走不到。要她走上樓梯是不可能的。
questions.answer: Chloe could hardly walk after the race, let alone climb the stairs.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊在比賽後幾乎連路也走不到，更不用說走上樓梯。

questions.prompt: The shop does not offer local delivery. International shipping is completely unavailable.
questions.promptZh: 這間商店不提供本地送貨服務。國際付運服務就更加完全沒有。
questions.answer: The shop does not offer local delivery, let alone international shipping.
questions.answerZh: 這間商店連本地送貨服務也不提供，更不用說國際付運服務。
questions.highlight: The shop does not offer local delivery, let alone international shipping.

questions.prompt: Ethan cannot remember my name. Remembering my phone number is even less likely.
questions.promptZh: 伊森連我的名字也記不起來。他就更加不可能記得我的電話號碼。
questions.answer: Ethan cannot remember my name, let alone my phone number.
questions.answerZh: 伊森連我的名字也記不起來，更不用說我的電話號碼。
questions.highlight: Ethan cannot remember my name, let alone my phone number.

questions.prompt: Finding one volunteer would already be encouraging. Finding fifty would be extraordinary.
questions.promptZh: 找到一名義工已經令人鼓舞。找到五十名義工就更是非常難得。
questions.answer: Finding one volunteer would already be encouraging, let alone finding fifty.
questions.answerZh: 找到一名義工已經令人鼓舞，更不用說找到五十名義工。
questions.highlight: Finding one volunteer would already be encouraging, let alone finding fifty.

questions.prompt: I would not lend him ten dollars. Giving him my credit card is unthinkable.
questions.promptZh: 我連十元也不會借給他。把信用卡交給他就更加不可能。
questions.answer: I would not lend him ten dollars, let alone my credit card.

questions.highlight: I would not lend him ten dollars, let alone my credit card.

questions.prompt: The company is unable to meet this week’s orders. Accepting new ones is out of the question.
questions.promptZh: 公司無法完成本星期的訂單。接受新訂單就更加不用考慮。
questions.answer: The company cannot meet this week’s orders, let alone accept new ones.

questions.prompt: The small boat cannot safely cross the harbour. Sailing across the ocean is impossible.
questions.promptZh: 這艘小船連安全橫越海港也做不到。要它橫渡海洋是不可能的。
questions.answer: The small boat cannot safely cross the harbour, let alone sail across the ocean.
questions.answerZh: 這艘小船連安全橫越海港也做不到，更不用說橫渡海洋。

questions.prompt: The patient is not strong enough to stand without help. Walking home is even less possible.
questions.promptZh: 病人的體力不足以在沒有協助下站立。要他步行回家就更加不可能。
questions.answer: The patient is not strong enough to stand without help, let alone walk home.
questions.answerZh: 病人的體力連在沒有協助下站立也不足夠，更不用說步行回家。
questions.highlight: The patient is not strong enough to stand without help, let alone walk home.

questions.prompt: Grace has not finished the introduction. The rest of the report is still far from complete.
questions.promptZh: 格蕾絲連引言也未完成。報告的其餘部分就更加距離完成很遠。
questions.answer: Grace has not finished the introduction, let alone the entire report.
questions.answerZh: 格蕾絲連引言也未完成，更不用說整份報告。
questions.highlight: Grace has not finished the introduction, let alone the entire report.

questions.prompt: The class cannot agree on a title. Completing the group project is therefore far beyond them.
questions.promptZh: 全班連題目也未能達成共識。因此，要他們完成小組項目就更加困難。
questions.answer: The class cannot agree on a title, let alone complete the group project.
questions.answerZh: 全班連題目也未能達成共識，更不用說完成小組項目。

questions.prompt: This laptop barely has enough space for one video. It cannot store the entire course.
questions.promptZh: 這部手提電腦的儲存空間勉強只夠一段影片。它無法儲存整個課程。
questions.answer: This laptop barely has enough space for one video, let alone the entire course.

questions.highlight: This laptop barely has enough space for one video, let alone the entire course.

questions.prompt: The museum cannot properly protect its current collection. It cannot responsibly borrow rare paintings from overseas.
questions.promptZh: 博物館無法妥善保護現有館藏，因此也無法負責任地從海外借入珍貴畫作。

questions.answerZh: 博物館連現有館藏也無法妥善保護，更不用說從海外借入珍貴畫作。
questions.highlight: The museum cannot properly protect its current collection, let alone borrow rare paintings from overseas.

questions.prompt: Our team has not tested the basic system. Launching it to the public is still far beyond us.
questions.promptZh: 我們的團隊連基本系統也未測試。把系統向公眾推出仍然距離我們很遠。

questions.highlight: Our team has not tested the basic system, let alone launched it to the public.

questions.prompt: She would not tell her closest friend. She would certainly never tell a stranger.

questions.answer: She would not tell her closest friend, let alone a stranger.

questions.prompt: The school cannot provide every student with a tablet. Replacing all the tablets every year is impossible.

questions.prompt: The new employee barely understands the daily routine. The emergency procedure is far beyond his present knowledge.

questions.prompt: The family cannot pay this month’s rent. Saving for a new home is completely unrealistic.
questions.promptZh: 這個家庭連本月租金也無法支付。為購買新居而儲蓄就更加不切實際。
questions.answer: The family cannot pay this month’s rent, let alone save for a new home.
questions.answerZh: 這個家庭連本月租金也無法支付，更不用說為購買新居而儲蓄。

questions.prompt: This old bridge is not safe for bicycles. Heavy lorries certainly cannot use it.
questions.promptZh: 這座舊橋連單車使用也不安全。重型貨車當然更加不能使用。
questions.answer: This old bridge is not safe for bicycles, let alone heavy lorries.
questions.answerZh: 這座舊橋連供單車使用也不安全，更不用說重型貨車。
questions.highlight: This old bridge is not safe for bicycles, let alone heavy lorries.

questions.prompt: Noah would not touch the small insect. He would never hold the snake.
questions.promptZh: 諾亞連那隻小昆蟲也不願意觸摸。他絕對不會拿着那條蛇。
questions.answer: Noah would not touch the small insect, let alone hold the snake.
questions.answerZh: 諾亞連那隻小昆蟲也不願意觸摸，更不用說拿着那條蛇。
questions.highlight: Noah would not touch the small insect, let alone hold the snake.

questions.prompt: Our website can barely handle normal traffic. Thousands of extra visitors would make it crash.
questions.promptZh: 我們的網站勉強只能應付正常瀏覽量。數以千計的額外訪客會令網站當機。
questions.answer: Our website can barely handle normal traffic, let alone thousands of extra visitors.
questions.answerZh: 我們的網站勉強只能應付正常瀏覽量，更不用說數以千計的額外訪客。
questions.highlight: Our website can barely handle normal traffic, let alone thousands of extra visitors.

questions.prompt: The department has not agreed on what the problem is. It has certainly not developed a workable solution.
questions.promptZh: 部門連問題是甚麼也未能達成共識。它當然更加未能制定可行的解決方案。
questions.answer: The department has not agreed on what the problem is, let alone developed a workable solution.
questions.answerZh: 部門連問題是甚麼也未能達成共識，更不用說制定可行的解決方案。
questions.highlight: The department has not agreed on what the problem is, let alone developed a workable solution.

questions.prompt: This town cannot provide clean water to every existing home. It has no capacity to provide it to a large new housing estate.
questions.promptZh: 這個城鎮無法為所有現有住戶提供清潔食水。它沒有能力為一個大型新屋苑提供食水。
questions.answer: This town cannot provide clean water to every existing home, let alone to a large new housing estate.
questions.answerZh: 這個城鎮連所有現有住戶也無法供應清潔食水，更不用說一個大型新屋苑。
questions.highlight: This town cannot provide clean water to every existing home, let alone to a large new housing estate.

questions.prompt: The researchers have not confirmed the basic result. They certainly cannot explain why it happened.
questions.promptZh: 研究人員連基本結果也未能確認。他們當然更加無法解釋結果出現的原因。
questions.answer: The researchers have not confirmed the basic result, let alone explained why it happened.
questions.answerZh: 研究人員連基本結果也未能確認，更不用說解釋結果出現的原因。
questions.highlight: The researchers have not confirmed the basic result, let alone explained why it happened.

questions.prompt: Our hospital does not have enough nurses for the current wards. A new emergency centre would require even more staff.
questions.promptZh: 我們的醫院連現有病房所需的護士也不足。一個新的急症中心會需要更多人手。
questions.answer: Our hospital does not have enough nurses for the current wards, let alone a new emergency centre.
questions.answerZh: 我們的醫院連現有病房所需的護士也不足，更不用說一個新的急症中心。
questions.highlight: Our hospital does not have enough nurses for the current wards, let alone a new emergency centre.

questions.prompt: The charity can barely cover its daily costs. It has no money to expand its services across the city.
questions.promptZh: 這間慈善機構勉強只能支付日常開支。它沒有資金把服務擴展至全城。
questions.answer: The charity can barely cover its daily costs, let alone expand its services across the city.
questions.answerZh: 這間慈善機構勉強只能支付日常開支，更不用說把服務擴展至全城。
questions.highlight: The charity can barely cover its daily costs, let alone expand its services across the city.

questions.prompt: Can this trainee deal with a simple complaint alone? No. Managing a serious crisis would be far beyond him.
questions.promptZh: 這名實習員工能否獨自處理簡單投訴？不能。要他處理嚴重危機就遠超他的能力。
questions.answer: This trainee cannot deal with a simple complaint alone, let alone manage a serious crisis.
questions.answerZh: 這名實習員工連簡單投訴也無法獨自處理，更不用說處理嚴重危機。
questions.highlight: This trainee cannot deal with a simple complaint alone, let alone manage a serious crisis.

questions.prompt: Our small business has not entered the local market. Competing successfully overseas is far beyond its present position.
questions.promptZh: 我們的小型企業連本地市場也未打入。在海外成功競爭遠遠超出它目前的發展階段。
questions.answer: Our small business has not entered the local market, let alone competed successfully overseas.
questions.answerZh: 我們的小型企業連本地市場也未打入，更不用說在海外成功競爭。
questions.highlight: Our small business has not entered the local market, let alone competed successfully overseas.

questions.prompt: Adrian was nervous about giving one short interview. Appearing live before millions of viewers was unimaginable to him.
questions.promptZh: 阿德里安連進行一次簡短訪問也感到緊張。在數百萬觀眾面前直播亮相對他來說更是難以想像。
questions.answer: Adrian was nervous about giving one short interview, let alone appearing live before millions of viewers.
questions.answerZh: 阿德里安連進行一次簡短訪問也感到緊張，更不用說在數百萬觀眾面前直播亮相。
questions.highlight: Adrian was nervous about giving one short interview, let alone appearing live before millions of viewers.

questions.prompt: Passing the entrance test would already be a major achievement for him. Winning a full scholarship would be extraordinary.
questions.promptZh: 通過入學試對他來說已經是一項重大成就。取得全額獎學金就更加難得。
questions.answer: Passing the entrance test would already be a major achievement for him, let alone winning a full scholarship.
questions.answerZh: 通過入學試對他來說已經是一項重大成就，更不用說取得全額獎學金。
questions.highlight: Passing the entrance test would already be a major achievement for him, let alone winning a full scholarship.

questions.prompt: Completing secondary school was already beyond her expectations. Earning a university degree seemed even more impossible.
questions.promptZh: 完成中學教育已經超出她的預期。取得大學學位看來就更加不可能。
questions.answer: Completing secondary school was already beyond her expectations, let alone earning a university degree.
questions.answerZh: 完成中學教育已經超出她的預期，更不用說取得大學學位。
questions.highlight: Completing secondary school was already beyond her expectations, let alone earning a university degree.
